subject: Revert "basic auth for so-monitoring"
commit_message:
Revert "basic auth for so-monitoring"

This reverts commit 6f4cfe7a3b3c258ba21ca54402122b5df7579fff.

Issue-ID: OJSI-169
Signed-off-by: k.kazak <k.kazak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Id40e44a91fcf6d5fa0dff542faae6d28b95cf867

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2955/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2955

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Is this commit still relevant? Should it be merged?

Patch Set 1:

i think it is relevant. A question for Katsia... the SO Monitor UI part is already merged for El Alto. This is the corresponding check in for the fix. I think it should be in.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Hey Katsia, can you please attach results to this review to show successful startup of so-monitoring? Then we can merge.
Thanks,
Mike.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
